name: I have prior back issues, can I still claim ladder fall at work in Ogden?
description: Yes, comp covers aggravation—get doctor opinion.

mainEntity.name: I have prior back issues, can I still claim ladder fall at work in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, comp covers aggravation—get doctor opinion.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, workers' comp covers aggravation** of pre-existing conditions from work falls.[1][6]

Utah courts allow if employment increased risk/injury.[1]

- Need medical proof work worsened it.
- Not just 'onset of pain'.[8]

Insurers deny routinely—fight with experts.

Attorneys specialize in these.
